use_cases: Add ambient visual interest to hero sections with rising luminescent particles
Create decorative backgrounds for landing pages and marketing sites
Enhance section dividers with subtle animated glow effects
Provide visual flourishes for SaaS dashboards and product showcases
Add depth and movement to minimal landing page designs
ai_summary: RisingGlow is an ambient particle animation component that creates vertically rising glowing dots in a specified color. The component generates configurable particles with randomized positions, sizes, and animation delays to produce a natural, flowing effect. It's designed as a decorative visual enhancement for sections, heroes, or backgrounds rather than a functional UI element.
